title: Head-to-Toe Assessment (H2T)
description: NKBDS H2T head-to-toe assessment workbook — grouped by body system and sub-system.

choices.label: WDL= Appropriate to the situation, cooperative, appropriate eye contact; no unusual gestures, mannerisms or speech; no socially inappropriate behavior, verbal or physical aggressiveness toward self or others
Physically threatening or aggressive (Combative or Defiant)

items.x_wdlListDefinition: Appropriate to the situation, cooperative, appropriate eye contact; no unusual gestures, mannerisms or speech; no socially inappropriate behavior, verbal or physical aggressiveness toward self or others
Mood and affect appropriate for situation; affect consistent with mood; no agitation, anxiety, euphoria, lability

Thought processes appropriate to situation, logical, relevant; no delusions and hallucinations; no spontaneous self-reported suicidal thoughts (not asked q shift, full suicide assessment via risk tool)

choices.label: WDL= No cardiac symptoms. Regular rate.  S1, S2, no adventitious heart sounds.

items.x_flowsheetSectionAggregateWdlDefinition: No cardiac symptoms. Regular rate.  S1, S2, no adventitious heart sounds.

choices.label: WDL= Abdomen non-tender, non-distended and soft unless gravid.  Bowel sounds audible, bowel movements per patient's baseline.  No subjective GI symptoms reported (output is not documented here)

items.x_flowsheetSectionAggregateWdlDefinition: Abdomen non-tender, non-distended and soft unless gravid.  Bowel sounds audible, bowel movements per patient's baseline.  No subjective GI symptoms reported (output is not documented here)

items.x_wdlListDefinition: Abdomen soft, non-tender, non-distended unless gravid
Bowel sounds audible, bowel movements per patient's baseline

choices.label: WDL= No bleeding, trauma, drainage, congestion, dryness, redness, swelling, or tenderness. Mucosa and lips intact.  Neck symmetrical, soft.  No acute hearing changes, tinnitus or ear obstruction.  No involuntary movements in head and face.  Sclera white, no eye drooping, no acute vision change. Voice intact

items.x_flowsheetSectionAggregateWdlDefinition: No bleeding, trauma, drainage, congestion, dryness, redness, swelling, or tenderness. Mucosa and lips intact.  Neck symmetrical, soft.  No acute hearing changes, tinnitus or ear obstruction.  No involuntary movements in head and face.  Sclera white, no eye drooping, no acute vision change. Voice intact

items.x_wdlListDefinition: No involuntary movements in head and face
No drainage, Redness, swelling, obstruction.  No acute hearing changes
Sclera white, No trauma, burning, drainage, drooping, dryness, Redness, swelling, acute vision change
Skin and mucosa intact; No swelling, lesion(s), drainage, difficulty chewing
Neck soft, voice intact, no masses, swelling, or tenderness
No drainage, congestion, dryness, postnasal drip.  No involuntary movements in head and face
No drainage, Redness, swelling, obstruction.  No acute hearing changes
Sclera white, No trauma, burning, drainage, drooping, dryness, swelling, edema, acute vision change

items.prompt: Ankle Musculoskeletal Additional Assessment L WDL

choices.label: WDL= No swelling, pain, weakness, or injury in extremities, ankles, back, chest, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, trunk, and wrists.  Full range of motion.

items.x_wdlListDefinition: No swelling, pain, weakness, or injury in extremities, ankles, back, chest, elbows, fingers, hips, knees, shoulders, toes, trunk, and wrists.  Full range of motion.

choices.label: WDL= Alert, oriented x4.  Appropriate for age.  Face is symmetrical.  Follows commands, no memory loss noted or reported (document formal memory assessment separately if completed). No difficulities swallowing.  Pupils equal, reactive, and round.  Speech is clear.

items.x_flowsheetSectionAggregateWdlDefinition: Alert, oriented x4.  Appropriate for age.  Face is symmetrical.  Follows commands, no memory loss noted or reported (document formal memory assessment separately if completed). No difficulities swallowing.  Pupils equal, reactive, and round.  Speech is clear.

choices.label: Long term memory loss noted or reported
Short term memory loss noted or reported
WDL= Chest excursion and trachea symmetrical.  No cough.  No sputum.  Clear lung sounds.  Unlabored, no shortness of breath, no retractions.  Regular respiratory pattern.

items.x_flowsheetSectionAggregateWdlDefinition: WDL= Chest excursion and trachea symmetrical.  No cough.  No sputum.  Clear lung sounds.  Unlabored, no shortness of breath, no retractions.  Regular respiratory pattern.

items.x_wdlListDefinition: Unlabored, no shortness of breath, no retractions

choices.label: WDL= Warm, dry, intact, with appropriate, even tone. No generalized skin abnormalities. No minor skin integrity findings (see table).  Major skin findings documented in LDA.

items.x_flowsheetSectionAggregateWdlDefinition: WDL= Warm, dry, intact, with appropriate, even tone. No generalized skin abnormalities. No minor skin integrity findings (see table).  Major skin findings documented in LDA.

items.x_wdlListDefinition: Appropriate, even tone, No generalized skin abnormalities
Warm, dry, intact, with appropriate, even tone. No generalized skin abnormalities. No minor skin integrity findings (see table).  Major skin findings documented in LDA.

choices.label: Rash (including as more general term than hives)

choices.label: WDL = No symptoms reported  (output is documented in I/0, use Zero in I/o for anuria, bladder scanner results in I/O, incontinence might also be in I/O...needs discussion or keep here?)
